rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban
No stale markers, no 'fixed' retrospectives, no session biography.
Credit the original when paraphrasing a named technique.
Always 'you', never 'the student'; teacher framing stays out of body.
Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body.
Punchy framing keeps its punch; carve-out lives downstream.
No combative verbs about the agent in body prose.
Earn every technical term on first use.
Specify which CLAUDE.md layer — every time.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 72:Add one small rule to `CLAUDE.md` for future source-based writing in this folder.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Specify `./CLAUDE.md` (team rules for this folder) to disambiguate from personal `./.claude.local.md` or user-level `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md`.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Section headers use command verbs when the section is about doing something.
Body 'read it' / 'look at it' / 'notice X' after chat-print is dead weight.
Every prompt block gets a one-sentence action lead-in.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 41,67,97,113,133:Phases 2–6 lack standalone one-sentence action lead-ins before their `**Prompt**` labels. Rule 2 requires each prompt to have a lead-in on its own line immediately before the label.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Add a one-sentence lead-in line before each `**Prompt**` label (lines 41, 67, 97, 113, 133). Examples: Phase 2: 'Ask Cowork to run a fact-checking subagent on the generated answer.' Phase 3: 'Ask Cowork to draft a rule for CLAUDE.md based on the findings.' Phase 4: 'Ask Cowork to regenerate the briefing using the saved prompt.' Phase 5: 'Ask Cowork to fact-check the new answer and compare findings.' Phase 6: 'Ask Cowork to fix the answer and run the checker one final time.'

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Canonical presentation shape — lead-in, label with destination, blank line, fenced block.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 41,67,97,113,133:Phases 2–6 do not follow the canonical shape: lead-in should be a standalone line immediately before the `**Prompt**` label, with a blank line separating them.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Reformat Phases 2–6 to match the canonical shape: one-sentence lead-in on its own line, blank line, `**Prompt** *(Cowork)*`, blank line, fenced block. Phase 1 (lines 19–31) already follows this shape correctly.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: `subagent` is allowed in prompt blocks; explain why after the prompt.
